prompt: The dashboard page looks too bare — plain h1, 4-card grid with raw text, basic table. Make it more informative and polished. Stat cards should show real context, audit table should feel like a proper log viewer with status badges. Keep using the existing stack (Pico CSS, HTMX, app.css classes).

assertions.text: uses-page-header-class: Output HTML contains class='page-header' or class="page-header" for the title section
uses-badge-class-in-audit-table: Output HTML uses badge or badge-* classes somewhere in the audit table area
has-empty-state-for-audit: Output HTML has a conditional block handling empty audit events ({% else %} or {% if %})
no-new-css-framework: Output HTML does not reference bootstrap, tailwind, bulma, or any CDN link
has-htmx-refresh: Output HTML has hx-trigger with a polling interval (every Xs) for the audit table
uses-pico-vars: Any inline style additions use var(--...) Pico variables rather than raw hex values
